parameters.query: SELECT discord_id, clockify_user_id FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = true AND clockify_user_id IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE pipemind.clockify_projects SET is_active = false, updated_at = now() WHERE is_active = true AND last_synced_at < $1::TIMESTAMPTZ;
UPDATE pipemind.project_memberships SET is_active = false, updated_at = now() WHERE is_active = true AND last_synced_at < $1::TIMESTAMPTZ;

SELECT cp.clockify_project_id, cp.name
FROM pipemind.clockify_projects cp
WHERE cp.first_seen_at >= $1::TIMESTAMPTZ
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM pipemind.project_repos pr
    WHERE pr.clockify_project_id = cp.clockify_project_id
  );
INSERT INTO pipemind.system_state (key, value) VALUES ('clockify_last_sync', $1) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, updated_at = now();
